entry.title: Re: Preparing for SAP Identity Management’s End-of-Maintenance in 2027
entry.content:
Hi Michael, Thanks for the post and insight on collaboration between Microsoft and SAP.

It is good to know that SAP is going have Cloud Identity Services as a part of their IAM strategy.  The issue I see is with bundled CIS tenants does not support SCIM destinations unless they are SAP Systems and just for SCIM connectors customer have to buy license for IAG. If customers have to adopt and leverage their investments in SAP, then SAP should look at making SCIM connector available free of charge/bundle so that customers can integrate 3rd party Products. It doesn't make sense to buy IAG just for sake of SCIM connector, specifically for customers who have On-Premises GRC. 

With sunset of SAP idM, customers will not have any On-Premises IAM Product - Is that right?  

Cheers,

Priyank

entry.title: SAP Warehouse number
entry.content:
Hi all,

how to get warehouse number /SCWM/LGN for assigning parameter to particular person in EWM PRD SYSTEM

Thanks,

Sai

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Global Counter
entry.content:
Hello,

You can leverage Number Ranges in SAP Cloud Integration that would solve the purpose.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/cloud-integration-working-with-number-ranges/ba-p/13372494 

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/managing-number-ranges 

Regards,

Sri

entry.title: Stored Procedure Notification
entry.content:
Hi

  I want only 1-2 users should be able to Active Item in Item Master . When Item is created by other than these 2 users it should be In-Active by default.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Unraveling the SAP DataSphere: Insights in bite-sized pieces
entry.content: Nice Information

entry.title: Enable wishlist extension
entry.content:
Are there steps to enable the wishlist extension in SAP Commerce Cloud DIGITS? We are trying to use the class Wishlist2Service in our codebase, but the addon for wishlist is missing. These are the steps we are trying to follow - 

 We have already added this line to localextensions.xml -

<extension name='wishlist' />

 

Do we need to copy any additional extensions into modules folder to enable this functionality? Or any other instructions you can send us?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Enable wishlist extension
entry.content:
From SAP Commerce OOTB, there is a wishlist extension which defines the Wishlist2Service api. This extension provides the necessary Database and Backend logic to support wishlists, but without any frontend.

Please find API documentation in this link that you shared. 

The wishlist extension provides only services and the type system to support wishlist. Managing wishlist needs through frontend, needs to be customized or developed by a development team.

entry.title: Is SAP involved in refreshes that are executed via the Instance Refresh Tool?
entry.content:
Hello All,

Is SAP somehow involved in refreshes that are executed via the Instance Refresh Tool?

I am aware that we have an altogether Manual refresh process, where we will create an SAP ticket and request SAP to perform the refresh, that we do for Onboarding 1.0 and other modules that IRT tool doesn't support.

However, just wanted to understand, if SAP is involved in the self-initiated IRT requests or it is all an automated process (Pre-programmed) without any involvement of SAP representatives.

Kindly advice.

entry.title: Validation on Reference Field
entry.content:
Hi

  I want that in a reference column first 10 characters be numeric and then Data . After that user can enter anything.

Thanks

entry.title: Reference field FPLAA-WAERK of field BIL_PRT_COM-HEAD_DETAIL-PAYMENT_CARDS-CMPRE_FLT cannot be use
entry.content:
While working with Adobe form we have used the CMPRE_FLT field this is of data type FLTP length 16.

now i am not able to add the reference field because it is not currency field.

I am getting error like below.

Please let me know is there any alternative solution available for this.

Thanks in advace.

BR,

Ashok Reddy

entry.title: Re: Be Visual! Use Official Icons and Samples for SAP Business Technology Platform Solution Diagrams
entry.content:
for new SAP BTP solution diagrams, kindly check out BTP Solution Diagrams | BTP Solution Diagrams (sap.github.io)

thanks to @fabianl

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Cloud (trial): Create database issue
entry.content: If anyone is still facing the issue even after the entitlement adjustment. Consider deleting the space and recreating it.

entry.title: Re: Extension fields in employee time sheet in Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Hello @PhilMarsh 

Standard extensibility would not be introduced to the timesheet due to the technical design limitations mentioned in the blog post. 

About adding extension fields of other data types - this is the first time we've received such a request. It would be great if you could post it as an improvement request in the customer influence portal https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886. It can be taken up if we see multiple partners have a similar need. 

Thank you for reaching out !

Regards,
Sandy

entry.title: Re: Termination rule is not triggering if the termination date is the end date of the month.
entry.content:
Hi @I330101 Soraia,

Thank you very much for your response.

I have built the below Termination rule, please let me know is there anything need to be added to the rule.

Regards,

Hafeez

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud Edition: Email status 'sent' in app: Mon...
entry.content:
Hi @Monddes,

I would recommend reviewing the following knowledge base articles that describes your scenario and contains the resolution:

  • SAP KBA 3274509 - Emails do not reach the recipients - SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • SAP KBA 3265907 - Output Items of Email channel are completed but emails does not reach recipient - S/4HANA Cloud

Additionally please validate the allowed email domains and default email address for email outbound (SCCUI 101311, 101312 and 101313). If the address doesn't match with the sender or recipient domains on the allowlists, the email will not be sent. For more detailed information: Regulating Email Outbound

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: A new common place to find SAP Reference architecture diagrams from the community
entry.content:
I’ve been quiet for a long time and thought it was time that I started blogging again. And why not start with a bit of an “announcement”. You might be aware of the newly released Reference Architecture section on the SAP Discovery Center and also the new blog post from yesterday about the guidelines to create solution diagrams. Which is something I’ve welcomed very much. It’s not a place that the community so far at least easily can contribute to. On the other hand we have an amazing library that is auto updated for diagrams.net which Ronnie André Bjørvik Sletta published and Mauricio Lauffer has updated since. This allows easily get the Service icons for SAP BTP services into Diagrams.net or Draw.io to create the diagrams. However my problem with having a place to go to, to get started with a diagram or look for inspiration isn’t really met. So I had a chat with Mauricio and it seemed like my problem wasn’t only felt by me. So we came up with a solution. 

I hope you are as excited as me to now know that we just extended the github repository to now also host reference architectures. It’s all maintained in the Github repo itself and hosted via Github pages. 

The idea is that we as a community can upload reference architecture diagrams, for other community members to use and share, so we can all get a common language and ideas on how to create these amazing diagrams. 

There are currently three diagrams available with hopefully a lot more to come. The way it works is that each diagram will have a title, description and some tags for searching. You will be able to see a picture of the current diagram and then there is a link that will open up the diagram in diagrams.net with all the updated service icons and you can then adjust it as you see fit to accomodate your needs. Hopefully saving you a significant amount of time. 

Contribution 

If you want to contribute the flow should be fairly easy. You need to either fork the repository via github or simply go to the repository and press the period key. You can also just click this link 

Export the diagram you want to share in an XML format.

 

 

And simply upload it into the upload folder. Create a new pull request 

And use the template below. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

# Title 

[Title] 

# Description 

[Description] 

# Image 

[Paste a copy of your image] 

# Tags 

[Add any relevant tags]

 

 

 

 

 

 

When you submit this pull request. A pipeline will run that will move the diagram into it’s appropriate folder, create a markdown file based on the above template and update the main summary.md file which is used to create the github pages. Once the pull request is merged into the main branch. Your contribution will become available. 

Before you leave. 

This repository isn’t trying to steal anything away from the amazing work done by the discovery center team, simply just trying to give an alternative and a place for the community to be able to share the diagrams, so we hopefully all get better at creating these.

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 3
entry.content: I did it in a separate file 🙂 I was about to paste an image but realised that that will give away the answer haha

entry.title: Re: Looking to execute HTTP Request using body in SPA
entry.content:
Hi Ron,

The trigger option is used when you need to trigger a process using an API; otherwise, you don't need to do anything.

entry.title: Re: Invalid column name error when passing Name parameter
entry.content: Thanku so much . It works 🙂

entry.title: Application for SAP's Digital Skills Initiative - Motunrayo
entry.content:
Dear SAP DSI Team,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the Digital Skills Initiative by SAP. As a black woman aiming to transition from Talent Management to HCM consulting, specifically through SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core, I find this program directly aligns with my aspirations and background.

My career in HR has imbued me with a passion for leveraging technology to enhance workplace inclusivity and efficiency. This transition represents not just a personal growth opportunity but a chance to contribute to diversifying the tech industry—a sector where women and particularly women of color are underrepresented.

Beyond fulfilling the program's target demographics, I bring a wealth of experience in HR that can enrich my approach to technology implementations. This program offers a unique opportunity for me to deepen my technical expertise, enabling me to drive meaningful change within organizations through the strategic use of SAP SuccessFactors.

I am excited about the possibility of joining SAP's Digital Skills Initiative, seeing it as a stepping stone to not only advancing my career but also to serving as a role model and advocate for diversity in tech. I look forward to acquiring knowledge and potentially contributing my perspective to this program.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,

Motunrayo O.

@admin

entry.title: Re: GRC Tuesdays: Announcing SAP’s plans for a next generation Governance, Risk, and Compliance Plat
entry.content:
Update February 2024:

As per SAP Note 3326989, mainstream maintenance timeline for SAP Access Control 12.0, SAP Process Control 12.0 and SAP Risk Management 12.0 will be until end of 2027, with extended maintenance until 2030, and customer-specific maintenance only from there onwards.

entry.title: Re: How to I set the UI5 version used in CF?
entry.content:
The configuration is manifest is used by Work Zone to set a stable UI version.

"sap.platform.cf": {
	   "ui5VersionNumber": "1.108.x"
    },

If you open your app with a html file, the version is determined by the version of the UI5 library referenced in the html file. If you open your application directly from "HTML5 Applications", it is launched with the index.html packaged with your application. So the version referenced by this index.html will be used. So if you want to use a specific version, adjust the version referenced in the file index.html packaged with your application.

entry.title: Re: Rate Determination Error for Transportation Zone
entry.content: Thanks Narender for your reply. Config wise all ok. There is a code correction suggested by the SAP for this error . 3308454 - Scale value not determined for zones in Calculation rules tab. Once Implement it worked fine . Thanks

entry.title: Re: Application for SAP's Digital Skills Initiative - Motunrayo
entry.content: I'm an HR professional with 7+ years of experience in strategic HR roles across diverse industries, where I led talent integration, recruitment, performance management and HR analytics projects. My expertise spans talent management, compensation and benefits , and HR data migration, supported by an MBA in HR Management. I'm passionate about transitioning into a SAP HCM Consulting career.

entry.title: How to use Cloud SDK OpenAPI Client with CAP?
entry.content:
Hi community,

I'm attempting to use the Cloud SDK's OpenAPI Client in a CAP Java project, but I'm unable to access the generated API client. The structure of my project is as follows:

The OpenAPI Client has been generated with the following setting in pom.xml.

			<plugin>
				<groupId>com.sap.cloud.sdk.datamodel</groupId>
				<artifactId>openapi-generator-maven-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>${cloud.sdk.version}</version>
				<executions>
					<execution>
						<goals>
							<goal>generate</goal>
						</goals>
						<phase>generate-sources</phase>
					</execution>
				</executions>
				<configuration>
					<inputSpec>${project.basedir}/api-specs/AuthorizationAPI.yaml</inputSpec>
					<outputDirectory>${project.basedir}/openapi</outputDirectory>
					<apiPackage>customer.cap_openapi.generated.authorization.api</apiPackage>
					<modelPackage>customer.cap_openapi.generated.authorization.model</modelPackage>
					<apiMaturity>released</apiMaturity>
				</configuration>
			</plugin>

Here's the source for the CAP event handler:

package customer.cap_openapi.handlers;

import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;

import com.sap.cds.services.handler.annotations.On;
import com.sap.cds.services.handler.annotations.ServiceName;
import com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.DestinationAccessor;
import com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.HttpDestination;

import customer.cap_openapi.generated.authorization.api.RoleCollectionsApi;
import cds.gen.authorizationservice.*;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

@Component
@ServiceName(AuthorizationService_.CDS_NAME)
class AuthorizationServiceHandler {

    Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(AuthorizationServiceHandler.class);
    
    @On(event = GetRoleCollectionsContext.CDS_NAME)
    public void getRoleCollections(GetRoleCollectionsContext context) {
        logger.info("getRoleCollection handler");

        HttpDestination destination = DestinationAccessor.getDestination("xsuaa").asHttp();
        // RoleCollectionsApi rolecollectionApi = new RoleCollectionsApi(destination);
        
    }
}

I'm encountering the error "The import customer.cap_openapi.generated cannot be resolved". Is the srv/openapi directory the appropriate place to generate the OpenAPI Client? How can I make the Open API client accessible from the event handler source?

The code for the project is available in the following Git repository: https://github.com/miyasuta/cap-openapi/tree/generate_client

entry.title: Re: header condition distribution base on minimum price c...
entry.content: Hi Jignesh , Again thanks for response. Yes i can get maximum possible discount. But facing problem who to get relevant base value to set this maximum possible discount. In condition base formula there is PR00 value , PMIN value , maximum possible discount , system calculated discount. I am unable to figure out how to get relevant base value with these information so system set only maximum discount for the item.

entry.title: Re: How to use Patch Action in Build Process Automation (...
entry.content:
You have to add the If Match as a Key to the parameters as shown below in the Patch method in action definition:

Also you will need to read the etag using Get Action and pass the etag to the Patch Action in the process.

To read etag, you need to modify the Get Action as below:

Hope this helps.

entry.title: A new common place to find SAP Reference architecture diagrams from the community
entry.content:
I’ve been quiet for a long time and thought it was time that I started blogging again. And why not start with a bit of an “announcement”. You might be aware of the newly released Reference Architecture section on the SAP Discovery Center and also the new blog post from yesterday about the guidelines to create solution diagrams. Which is something I’ve welcomed very much. It’s not a place that the community so far at least easily can contribute to. On the other hand we have an amazing library that is auto updated for diagrams.net which Ronnie André Bjørvik Sletta published and Mauricio Lauffer has updated since. This allows easily get the Service icons for SAP BTP services into Diagrams.net or Draw.io to create the diagrams. However my problem with having a place to go to, to get started with a diagram or look for inspiration isn’t really met. So I had a chat with Mauricio and it seemed like my problem wasn’t only felt by me. So we came up with a solution. 

I hope you are as excited as me to now know that we just extended the github repository to now also host reference architectures. It’s all maintained in the Github repo itself and hosted via Github pages. 

The idea is that we as a community can upload reference architecture diagrams, for other community members to use and share, so we can all get a common language and ideas on how to create these amazing diagrams. 

There are currently three diagrams available with hopefully a lot more to come. The way it works is that each diagram will have a title, description and some tags for searching. You will be able to see a picture of the current diagram and then there is a link that will open up the diagram in diagrams.net with all the updated service icons and you can then adjust it as you see fit to accomodate your needs. Hopefully saving you a significant amount of time. 

Contribution 

If you want to contribute the flow should be fairly easy. You need to either fork the repository via github or simply go to the repository and press the period key. You can also just click this link 

Export the diagram you want to share in an XML format.

 

 

And simply upload it into the upload folder. Create a new pull request 

And use the template below. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

# Title 

[Title] 

# Description 

[Description] 

# Image 

[Paste a copy of your image] 

# Tags 

[Add any relevant tags]

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

When you submit this pull request. A pipeline will run that will move the diagram into it’s appropriate folder, create a markdown file based on the above template and update the main summary.md file which is used to create the github pages. Once the pull request is merged into the main branch. Your contribution will become available. 

Before you leave. 

This repository isn’t trying to steal anything away from the amazing work done by the discovery center team, simply just trying to give an alternative and a place for the community to be able to share the diagrams, so we hopefully all get better at creating these.

entry.title: Re: Announcement: New release of content and central entry point for SAP BTP Solution Diagrams
entry.content: Thanks for sharing this Fabian, I've also released a blog about a place for the community to share their reference architectures.

entry.title: Re: Pass dynamic parameter to a table
entry.content:
@rosanna_chiarazzo 

var resultSet = Table_Scenario.getDataSource().getMembers("ZCP_DM_CCIND");

This may not be bringing all members, I think default is 200. You can check how to bring all members

https://help.sap.com/doc/958d4c11261f42e992e8d01a4c0dde25/release/en-US/index.html#DataSource_MgetMembers

Also if you just remove the filter on this dimension its a good as all members right ?

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Global Counter
entry.content: Perfect. Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 2
Re: I want to change MM072 message type in SAP
entry.content: Hi, I can't find this code. How can I find?

entry.title: Re: CVI Cockpit Precheck
entry.content:
Hi,

Do you have interval for object CVI_PRECHK? You could verify it via Transaction SNUM and maintain it as below.

  1. Go to transaction SNUM.
  2. Enter the object name CVI_PRECHK.
  3. Choose "Display".
  4. Choose "Interval Maintenance".
  5. Choose "Change Intervals".
  6. Create an interval (for example, from 0000000001 to 9999999999) and save.

Best Regards,

Grace

entry.title: Re: Legacy Data Migration-Materials & MDG

entry.title: S4HANA build with restoring S4hana backup on ECC and start application post kernel upgrade.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I would like check on feasibility of below approach to build S4HANA.

Approach:

1> Took backup S4HANA existing environment.

2> on ecc, restored the above backup.

3> Upgraded kernel that is compatible with S4HANA.

4> Started application.

expecting some technical views on above approach and can be helpful if there is any artifact by SAP to support the approach.

Thanks 

Vinaya

entry.title: Re: SF LMS and MS Teams Integration - VLS Error: Exceptio...
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

Few things you could check:

  1. Application permission type should be given in Azure as instructed in config guide.
  2. Add the instructor into the Policy in Azure.
  3. Update VLS settings of instructor by updating the email id in instructor profile.
  4. Update instructor account ID in VLS settings and Choose "Use existing account" in VLS settings.

Links to few guides that I followed:

 

3113230 - Microsoft Teams - VLS Implementation Supplementary Links + FAQs (sap.com)

entry.title: Getting started with SAP BTP Solution Diagram
entry.content:
SAP BTP Solution Diagram is finally released to harmonize the domain specific architectural diagrams on SAP Business Technology Platform. Though it wouldn't be a detailed blog, I'll list down some important points and references on it. 

So, what' new & different : 

  •         Diagram Harmonization on all the BTP offerings.
  •         Can serve architectural diagram creation on different use cases. Has three layered levels : L0, L1 & L2 to cater different expectations of recipients.
  •         Reusable diagram structures
  •         Can be used with raw.io or Microsoft PowerPoint.

Guideline to use : https://d.dam.sap.com/a/UbBJrVh/SAP-BTP-solution-diagram-design-guideline-v1-public.pdf?rc=10

How to use : SAP BTP Solution Diagrams can be used in two different ways as follows:

  • draw.io - The recommended option. It is an online diagram software for making flowcharts, process diagrams, org charts, UML, ER and network diagrams. it can be installed from Releases · jgraph/drawio-desktop (github.com) & upon installing, SAP BTP Solution Diagram libraries need to be imported from https://github.com/SAP/btp-solution-diagrams.git .
  • Microsoft PowerPoint - Microsoft PowerPoint can also be used with some limitations. The custom shapes and guidelines are present in this template https://d.dam.sap.com/a/e7KMGSu?rc=10

 The entire project guidelines are present here : BTP Solution Diagrams | BTP Solution Diagrams (sap.github.io)

What else? Happy exploring just like I'm doing right now 😊

entry.title: Re: B1SLayer: A clean and easy way to consume SAP Business One Service Layer with .NET
entry.content:

Perfect job. Thanks.

Mucip:)

However, I cannot find them in the Inventory Audit Report (already checked the right warehouse, from date to date). I don't know why.

Please help me how to check it.

Thank you so much.

entry.content: Just report them by clicking "Report Inappropriate Content" on the post.

entry.title: Re: Copy BP
entry.content: Hi, With fiori app manage business partner master data, there is such a functionality. Best Regards, Grace

entry.title: PostgREST for SAP HANA
entry.content: I've created a lib that exposes a REST API for HANA (similar to what PostgREST does for PostgreSQL) by introspecting the db. Right now it's for TS but Java bindings possible. Would anyone like to beta test that?

entry.title: How to Split a Bill of Exchange?
entry.content:
How to Split a Bill of Exchange? For example, a bill of exchange of 100,000 is split into two, which are 40,000 and 60,000 respectively.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Split a Bill of Exchange?
entry.content:
You can refer to the PDF on community for reference.

https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/p/pdf/asset/preview/QkXX2jq?ltr=a&rc=10

 

Hope the information could help you.

entry.title: Re: Digital Discovery Assessment - The guided decision between SAP S/4HANA Public or Private Cloud E
entry.content:
Hi Tobias,

Thanks for the detailed blog on DDA. As per the latest Partner Webinar on the Cloud ERP topic by SAP, held on Feb 6th, understand that now SI partners can as well execute DDA. SAP will grant access to it. In this context, if we are estimating for the DDA from SI side, do we need partial coverage for each functional areas - Finance, Sales & Procurement , Manufacturing etc (as per scope of customer ) to be part of this DDA ? Typically what is the timeline for this DDA - 3-4 weeks ?

Appreciate if you can help and answer these questions .

Regards,

Suma

entry.title: Re: BP - DELETE
entry.content:
Hi,

 

To delete BP, it is recommended to use SARA.

For the concrete steps, see 

KBA 2640553 and  2491026 

 

Best Regards,

Grace

entry.title: Re: MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT
entry.content:
Hi,

MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT can be used to sync BP <>customer/vendor.

To do that, you need firstly configure CVI in the system.

For CVI customizing, please see KBA 2290429.

After that, regarding on how to use MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT, I would recommend 

MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT and MDS_PPO2

Business Partner Usage of Postprocessing Office (PPO) | SAP Blogs

 

Best Regards,

Grace

entry.title: SAP CPI and Event Mesh Connectivity
entry.content:
We wanted to make a connection between SAP CPI(Neo) and Event Mesh, where we wanted to initialize the flow via scheduler, we just wanted to run our flow connect to Event mesh at specific time but what we observed is if we have to put scheduler in flow then used the request reply and added AMQP adapter but it gives us the error stating that "not compatible" . then we thought of using the rest endpoint via http adapter to consume message from EM queue, but we are getting 401 error statating "HTTP method not found" but it working via postman.

Just wanted to know can we connect CPI and EM via REST or not and is there other way where we can use scheduler and AMQP adapter

entry.title: How to change 'Started By' field value in SAP BPA process Instance
entry.content:
Hello Expertsm

In the above screenshot Started By comes default as the workflow destination users name. I want to change it to the actual user name. How can I achieve this?

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: CVI_COCKPIT program CVI_PRECHK_BATCH reports tax code...
entry.content:
Hi,

For country Serbia, the only standard tax category is RS1. RS2, RS3, RS4 are custom tax categories and have been mapped to function module BUPA_TAX_NUMBER_CHECK in view V_TFKTAXNUMTYPE. Hence for these tax categories, the only checks that are made should be those derived from your customizing in transaction OY17. 

Could you please check there?

 

Best Regards,

Grace

entry.title: Re: Validation Badi is not triggering for delete, Block/u...
entry.content:
Hi saikatjay,

I have added the  below filters for validation Badi.Could you please verify and confirm.

entry.title: Modeling Suggestion in DATASPHERE and SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am doing a greenfield implementation for a client.

Need your suggestions regarding the modeling approach for spaces and SAC.

We are planning to have separate SPACES for different functions (eg: SD, MM,FI) and one space for administrative data ( for applying DAC). is this the right approach to be followed?

also i want to restrict users in SAC stories. So planning to create folders for different functionalities like in space and add only required users into that folder. is there any other approach available in SAC.

 

Best regards,

Amith

entry.title: Key Mapping in SAP MDGF
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have   MDG hub system with 5 target system, I need to load the data from target system to MDGF hub system and also key mapping to be maintained.

Could you please let me know how can we achieve this.

Is there any documents or comments would be more helpfull.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Cloud - Calculation Views Transparent Filter...
entry.content: I solved the issue. It was due to Graphical Editor. If I set the Transparent Filters flag on the first projection node it works correctly instead to set it on Aggregation Node

entry.title: How to to key Mapping for SAP MDGF
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Could you please if there are any step by step document for Key Mapping in SAP MDG.

entry.title: The database structure has been modified. In order to resume this process, all open windows will be
entry.content:
Dear All,

All of clients is having a problem with SAP Business One.

Sometimes the message "The database structure has been modified. In order to resume this process, all open windows will be closed,Do you want to continue adding the user-defined field?" appears for users, When they click "Ok", the message is displayed endlessly. The only way is to interrupt SAP Business One through the task manager.

The message appears when there is a period of inactivity on the PC or network interruption.

The perform data check option is not enabled on the database.

They are on SAP Business One (SQL Server), Version 10 FP2208 

Is someone facing the same problem? Do you have any ideas to help me solve this problem please?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Help & solution how to apply Milestone billing on same items multiple times
entry.content:
Hi all SAP PS team member, please help me on this scenario regarding the possibility & the detail steps as per SAP screen if anyone come across such scenario.

>> My client have an requirement of above scenario for Milestone billing. Let me brief a bit below:

>> Total quantity planned for Item 1, Item - 2, Item 3 - 200 no.s

>> Sale order is created in multiple times during different period or month which I had marked in different colours (Blue, Yellow, Green). But WBS element is same for all the time.

>> As per Billing Terms & condition a item can be billed multiple times, but for every billing the process or milestone is fixed like 60%, 20%, 10%. Let me brief on this:

  Let me explain with an example: Item 1 needs to be delivered of 200 nos (Rs. 6000) in total in a phase wise manner. And during 1st phase 40 qty is delivered, initially we can bill 60% (Rs.720) against the actual delivered quantity, 20% (Rs. 240) after **bleep** or commissioning after few days or months, 10% after all job completed. Initially Business Invoiced 10% and got the advance with direct FI entry.

  Again After couple of weeks 2nd lot material of same item is delivered of 100 quantity. Same billing process will be followed like 60%, 20%, 10%. So on for all materials & services.

So how can we tackle this in Milestone creation and billing from SD side. How Milestone will be created in CJ20N or project Builder & how it will be assigned in Sale order.

>> If A Milestone no - 1 is applied initially with Actual date in CJ20N for Sale order - 1, Is it possible to use same milestone during 2nd Sale order - 2 & what will be the impact.

If there is any better approach please help me out.

 

Thanks

With Regards

Abhisek Mohanty

entry.title: Cannot determine the higher level
entry.content:
Hi ,GUYS . I have a question here, I want to creat a warehouse task for this HU,but the error message "Cannot determine the higher level" always show up ,who can tell me why ?

and there is this hu in Work Center Packing for Inbound Delivery:

I can not move it it will show another error message "HU EP1000048854 is not a planned HU. You cannot make changes",how can i move it?

entry.title: Re: SAP PCE (private cloud edition) security features
entry.content:
Hi,

I would recommend you to look at some SAP community blogs written by Jana introducing securing PCE:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/securing-rise-with-sap/ba-p/13519419

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/rise-with-sap-s-4hana-cloud-private-edition-cybersecurity-faq-explained/ba-p/13562875

Hope it helps.

Hi,

the playlist is gone and Videos are "Privat" / gone.

 

Any alternatives ?

entry.title: Re: The database structure has been modified. In order to...
entry.content:
Hi hlak,

This issue has been fixed in FP2305 for SAP Business One version 10.0.

Kindly refer to SAP Note 3268977 for the same.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: The database structure has been modified. In order to...
entry.content:
Hi,

This behaviour can occur with a wireless network (WLAN / WIFI). Low signal strength / quality will exacerbate the problem. SAP Business One is very sensitive to network interruptions and lag.

If this is the case for you, here are some solutions from best to worst:

  1. Connect workstations to your network with network cables.
  2. Install more wireless routers, to create better coverage.
  3. Get a better quality wireless router.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Deprecated features in Latest Goal Management
entry.content:
@VanessaLiThanks for the quick response. Just to confirm that this is what you are recommending, bearing in mind that we have not upgraded yet:

  1. Create a report in Adhoc reports to 'export' all existing active goals and associated tasks. (tens of thousands of lines in the report)
  2. In the active goal plan templates, add a Milestone and in it replicate the task fields (if it is possible to replicate them). Permission the milestone fields to be visible/editable as needed
  3. Somehow change the Adhoc report to be able to be imported using the new fields with the old data (assuming the data can be mapped easily)
  4. How do we then transfer the existing data in the report to these milestone fields in the system? If I do a goal import it will duplicate all the outputs for the users. Do I somehow need to delete all goals and then re-import them, or is there a way to just overwrite existing goals with the milestones and no tasks?

Thanks for your help on this. I imagine that other customers would benefit from a step by step guide for this, as we cannot afford to lose the active goal data. Until December last year, Tasks were an acceptable solution.

Best,

Julia

entry.title: Type of data container returned by DPC is wrong. 'Structure' is expected
entry.content: While creating post service

entry.title: Re: The database structure has been modified. In order to...
entry.content: SAP Note 3268977 link not working

entry.title: Re: Asking and Answering Questions in the Community After Migration
entry.content: There was an issue with my Universal User-ID. Now, I'm not longer connected with my old Community User. All Blogs only have the name "former_member183685" instead of my name. For sure, I'm also not longer able to edit my blogs. What can I do to connect my user now with my Community User so that I have access to my blogs again as author?

entry.title: Re: AR Credit Memo cancellation_Don't increase quantity.
entry.content:
Hi,

This is by design. When you cancel a document both the cancelled document and the cancellation document negate each other. The behaviour of the cancellation document is the exact opposite of the cancelled document.

Transactions that were reversed this way will not show up in any report (inventory audit, sales analysis, etc).

If you want to reverse a transaction, and have that reversal show up in reports, you have to use a different method.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI "Error - forbidd...
entry.content:
Well, I'll answer my own question for posterity sake...

Answer from SAP:

Technically speaking, we need the group values like SecureLoginServiceAdministrator at the user token issued by SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication (IAS). This works with the respective user group assignment at IAS while IAS is your IdP / user store.

As soon as you use IAS in "proxy-mode" with a different corporate IdP / user store connected, you can enable Identity Federation like you did to enhance the user data coming from your corporate IdP with the user group assignment managed at IAS.

If Identity Federation is off, the correct group assignment need to be done at your corporate IdP and correctly transferred to IAS. Unfortunately, different IdP solutions handle this topic in different ways. Microsoft Azure Active Directory (AD) / Microsoft Entra ID, for example, requires a paid subscription to be able to send group names as their default is to transfer the generated group id.

To make this a little more customizable, especially for the Microsoft Entra ID case, we've something on our roadmap for this year:

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=AF740456A03F1EDDAA9212F748EDC3E2&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=D595CD55D95B1EDEA2D6A9CD5A76206E

You need a valid S-User ID in order to access SAP Notes.

Kindly check with your SAP Business One Partner for the same.

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Permission Error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

i am try to complete the tutorial for SAP Build Process Automation on my BTP Trial Account.

I created my workflow after the following guideline:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-academy-salesorder.html#a3c15794-b510-4434-8920-70446f0d0b48

This is working so far.

Now i was working on the next part:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-academy-run-salesorderprocess.html#top

Under Step 3 i am facing a permission problem when starting a new instance:

Error:

I have all existing Admin/Developer Roles for Process Automation on the BTP Subaccount assigned.

Any ideas how i can solve this issue.

Thanks in Advance 🙂

Kind regards

Simon

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: 🇧🇪 SAP Build: Create Apps and Processes Without Coding (Ghent, Belgium)
entry.content:
Hello, where can we find the slides shown during the day?

Thx

entry.title: Re: Deprecated features in Latest Goal Management
entry.content:
@Julia_Gaskell For #4, you would need to remove the data records in Tasks, and duplicate the records under the field Milestones, in the csv file. In the csv file for the upload, there should be a column that specifies what type of record it is, and have that fill in MILESTONE.

Have professional services help out if necessary: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PERFORMANCE_AND_GOALS/4a24e48b5c384b18a81f6b661305021e/7f279b4b774e41e1bb69594021577494.html?q=import

 

Column Description Example

^TYPEIdentifies the item that the ACTION will be taken on. Valid options are: OBJECTIVE, TASK, MILESTONE, TARGET, METRICLOOKUP, OBJCOMMENT. Values are case sensitive.OBJECTIVE_GROUPV2 and OBJECTIVE_TEAM
ACTIONThe action to take on the item identified in ^TYPE. Valid options are: ADD, UPDATE, DELETE, ASSIGN, SHARE, UNSHARE, UNASSIGN. Values are case sensitive.

SHARE is used to add co-owners of team goals, and ASSIGN is used to assign team goals to the Goal Plan of someone in the team.

ADD

entry.title: Re: AR Credit Memo cancellation_Don't increase quantity.
entry.content:
Dear @Johan_H,
If the transaction relates to inventory, I saw both of them (Base transaction and cancellation transaction also appear on the inventory report).
The same with my case, other AR credit memo and it's cancellation also appear in Audit report, but some transaction not.

I don't know why.

entry.title: logged-in sales employee appears by default in the sales employee field in commercial documents
entry.content:
Hello,

We wish to apply the following configuration to the commercial documents (Offer, Order, Delivery):

· The name of the logged-in sales employee appears by default in the sales employee field.

· We do not want the system to display the name of the sales employee defined in the partner.

I have already defined default sales agent to user in user form,but always system select sales employee defined in the partner.

Could you please help resolving this issue ?

entry.title: Re: The database structure has been modified. In order to...
entry.content: No way to resolve this issue in this version that we have ?

entry.title: SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing - How to work with audit logs?
entry.content:
SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing writes the following audit logs:

  • Security event logs in case a user tried to logon to the administration UI with wrong password or in case someone tried to call the configuration and pricing services with an invalid oauth token.
  • Configuration change logs for each relevant setting that is changed by the customer or by SAP operations through the administration UI.

Furthermore, each creation and each deletion of a configuration or pricing document (through the corresponding endpoints of the configuration and pricing services) is logged:

Those logs also contain the so-called SAP Passport, which can tell you if the service endpoint was called from SAP Commerce Cloud or from SAP CPQ. 

The fields autoCleanup=true and the expiryDate in those logs tell you when the configuration or pricing document will be deleted automatically.

Please refer to the Security Guide for SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing to find a list of all kinds of written logs: Audit Logging | SAP Help Portal

SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing uses the SAP Audit Log service on SAP BTP: Audit Logging in the Cloud Foundry Environment | SAP Help Portal

Please note that there are two different views on the audit logs:

  • Consumer view (used by customers): User ids of customer users are visible, while user ids of SAP operations users are anonymized 
  • Provider view (used by SAP): User ids of customer users are anonymized, while user ids of SAP operations users are visible

Audit logs are kept for 90 days.

 

How to get access to the audit logs?

You can either use the Audit Log Viewer or the Audit Log Retrieval API.

 

Audit Log Viewer

To use the audit log viewer, open your BTP subaccount, go to menu Entitlements, press Edit button, press Add Service Plans button, search for Audit Log Viewer Service, choose its plan free (Application), press button Add 1 Service Plan, and press button Save.

Go to the menu Services → Service Marketplace in the same subaccount, search for Audit Log Viewer Service, open the corresponding tile and press the Create button. Press Create button in the popup dialog. Press View Subscription in the next popup dialog to switch to the menu Services → Instances and Subscriptions. There, you should see the application Audit Log Viewer Service with plan free next to the application SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing. 

Go to the menu Security → Role Collections in the same subaccount, create a new role collection with name Audit Log Viewer. Open the new role collection, press Edit button, assign the role(s) Auditlog_Auditor to the role collection and assign your user (usually the email address) to the role collection and press Save button.

With that, you can use the audit log viewer: Go to menu Services → Instances and Subscriptions, open the Audit Log Viewer Service and press Go to Application button.

Audit Log Viewer 1.0 opens with prefilled From-Date and To-Date filters, but empty search results list. Press Reload button to start the search. You should see all audit logs written for that subaccount in the selected time frame. You should for example see logs for the changes to the role collection that were done above. You can use the other filter input field to further restrict that list. 

The audit log viewer does only show the first 500 hits based on the chosen from- and to-date filters. 

 

Audit Log Retrieval API

The limitation in the audit log viewer of maximum 500 logs and its limited filter capabilities are problematic when you for example want to find out when a certain configuration or price document was created or deleted.

In that case, you must use the Audit Log Retrieval API, store the logs in a file, and analyze the logs there:

Create an instance of the service Audit Log Management:

  1. In the SAP BTP Cockpit Account Explorer choose your account
  2. Search and find your subaccount there and navigate to your space/org (if no org , create a new space/org for this subaccount)
  3. From navigation menu of the subaccount choose Services → Service Marketplace
  4. Search for the Audit Log Management Service and open the tile
  5. Press Create button
  6. In the popup dialog choose runtime environment Cloud Foundry and the created space, and enter an instance name like auditlogs. Press Create button to close the dialog.

 

Create a service key for that service instance:

  1. Go to menu Services → Instances and Subscriptions and click on the created instance to open it
  2. Press Create button in the Service Keys section
  3. Enter a service key name and press Create button  
  4. Click on View Credentials to open the service key details
  5. Find the service url, uaa url, client id, and client secret:

     

Do the service call:

  1. You should be seeing the service key details now. From there, take note of uaa.url, uaa.clientid, uaa.clientsecret and url.
  2. Generate an oauth token using the uaa.url, uaa.clientid, and uaa.clientsecret: 
    URL: <value of "uaa.url">/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials
    Method: POST
    Authentication Method: Basic Authentication
    Username: <Value of "uaa.clientid">
    Password: <Value of "uaa.clientsecret">
  3. From the response get the access_token and use it as Bearer token for the following GET request:
    <url (from service key)>/auditlog/v2/auditlogrecords
    Method : GET
    Authorization Bearer <access_token>
  4. Get the audit logs filtered by time (using from and to time):
    <url (from service key)>/auditlog/v2/auditlogrecords?time_from=2024-02-20T00:00:01&time_to=2024-02-20T23:59:59
    Method : GET
    Authorization Bearer <access_token>
  5. Check response header for field paging. To get the next chunk of logs, call:
    <url (from service key)>/auditlog/v2/auditlogrecords?handle=<handle from last paging response header>
    Method : GET
    Authorization Bearer <access_token>

With all the above steps, you should be able to get the service response in JSON format with all the audit logs related to that subaccount. 

Online docu: Audit Log Retrieval API Usage for Subaccounts in the Cloud Foundry Environment | SAP Help Portal

API docu: SAP Business Accelerator Hub

PowerShell script to extract the audit logs

 

 

# (!)Before running the script:
# replace placeholders <> for $uaaUri, $clientId, $clientSecret, and $uri (get them from service key)
# adapt the time_from- and time_to-timestamps in $query
 
 
# get oauth token
# ---------------
 
$uaaUri = "https://<your subdomain>.authentication.sap.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials"
$clientId = "<your client id>"
# use single quotes here otherwhise it will not work in PowerShell because of $ sign in string:
$clientSecret = '<your client secret>'
 
$user = $clientId
$pw = $clientSecret
$pair = "$($user):$($pw)"
$encodedCredentials = [System.Convert]::ToBase64String([System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes($pair))
$headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Basic $encodedCredentials" }
$response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $UaaUri -Method POST -Headers $headers
$token = (ConvertFrom-Json $response.Content).access_token
 
 
# read the audit logs and write to file:
# --------------------------------------
 
# Canary
# $uri = "https://auditlog-management.cfapps.sap.hana.ondemand.com/auditlog/v2/auditlogrecords"
 
$uri = "<region-specific auditlog service host>/auditlog/v2/auditlogrecords"
$query = "time_from=2024-02-20T00:00:01&time_to=2024-02-20T23:59:59"
 
$headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer " + $token; 'Accept' = 'application/json'}
 
$uri1 = $uri + '?' + $query
$response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $uri1 -Headers $headers
 
# uncomment to print in console:
#$response.statusCode
#$response.Headers.paging
 
if ($response.statusCode -eq 200) {
  $response.RawContent | Out-File -FilePath .\audit-logs.txt
 
  # read remaining audit logs:
  while ($response.Headers.containsKey("paging")) {
    $Uri2 = $Uri + '?' + $response.Headers.paging
    $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $Uri2 -Headers $Headers
 
    if ($response.statusCode -eq 200) {
      $response.RawContent | Out-File -FilePath .\audit-logs.txt -Append
    } else { break }
  }
 
# uncomment to display file content: 
#  Get-Content -Path .\audit-logs.txt
}

 

 

Open Windows PowerShell and copy & paste the above code to execute it. Depending on the used time_from/time_to-filters it can run quite long. Logs are written to the file audit-logs.txt in the same directory where the script was run.
 
Or store the above script as file MyPowerShellScript.ps1 and create a batch file (for example runPSscript.bat) like this to start it:
 

 

 

::from https://blog.danskingdom.com/allow-others-to-run-your-powershell-scripts-from-a-batch-file-they-will-love-you-for-it/
@ECHO OFF
CLS
SET ThisScriptsDirectory=%~dp0
SET PowerShellScriptPath=%ThisScriptsDirectory%MyPowerShellScript.ps1
PowerShell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& '%PowerShellScriptPath%'";

 

 

 
With that, you should be able to use audit logs to analyze related issues with configuration and pricing services.

entry.title: Re: The database structure has been modified. In order to resume this process, all open windows will
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja ,

First off, thanks for the insightful blog post on using ABAP Test Cockpit in the cloud. It's been a great help as we navigate our integration processes. We're currently in the midst of trying to connect our private cloud S/4 HANA system via an RFC connection to the central ATC check system, which is an ABAP runtime on SAP Business Technology Platform. We've configured the SM59 destination as required, but we've hit a wall now.

We're encountering an authorization error with the message "00024You are not authorized to logon to the target system (error code 1)." It seems like we need to adjust the permissions for the inbound communication user in the ABAP runtime on BTP, but we're a bit stuck on the best way to proceed.

Do you have any advice or tips on how to properly set up the authorization for this user? Any guidance on ensuring the right roles or permissions are assigned would be immensely helpful.

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Julian Kuipers

entry.title: Re: what is the best method to upgrade MS sql from 2014 t...
entry.content: Hi Jiajia, Thank you so much.

entry.title: Re: AR Credit Memo cancellation_Don't increase quantity.
entry.content:
@Dear @Johan_H,

I already found it. Because the AR Reserve Invoice has not copy to delivery. So when do a Credit Note based on it will not affect the inventory.

entry.title: Functions Issue (By Me) Tab
entry.content:
Hi,

I Creating Function and use multiple time. 

when i change one of the function I used and click Advance > Overwrite local template
it should update all function right? but that's not happened
